productDisplayName: Puma Men Kraftek White Silver Shoe
description: Pay tribute to the ultimate Sports car with this Kraftek Scuderia ferrari lifestyle shoe from puma. The edgy design performs well on the race course and looks equally cool with casual wear in urban settings. Upper Leather and synthetic upper for comfortable Fit Perforations on the tongue, toe box and inner lining for enhanced breathability Lace-ups for snug fit Metal Scuderia Ferrari badge on the side for added style Implied puma formstripe on the side and Puma jumping cat logo to create a fashion statement Synthetic toe guard stitched onto upper and rubber heel guard Heel cup for protection and structure of heel area Midsole Phylon midsole for superior shock absorption Outsole Rubber sole with tire profile design for perfect grip on any terrain
